name: Nvidia
rationale: Best momentum/catalyst blend in the provided state feed: NVDA shows positive momentum on all required horizons (1W +4.11%, 1M +3.56%, 3M +8.14%) with the lowest daily volatility among the bullish candidates at 2.50%, so it clears my long-only momentum filter and ranks ahead of AMD on regime discipline. The catalyst side is also cleaner: NVIDIA said Vera Rubin is ramping into full production to pow
